## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit messages
- [ ] Tests added/updated (every bug fix includes a regression test)
- [ ] `make lint` and `make test-race` pass locally
- [ ] Database changes ship as a new reversible migration (existing migrations untouched)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or local-only files committed
